info.title: Oxygen Pelatologio API
info.description:
The Oxygen Pelatologio ERP API lets third-party applications integrate with the Pelatologio ERP without using the web interface.

Typical integrations include:
* Issuing invoices, credit notes, delivery notes and notices from an external system (e.g. an e-shop, POS, or in-house ordering tool).
* Synchronising contacts (clients/suppliers), products, taxes and warehouses.
* Performing VAT lookups (Greek GSIS / EU VIES) and document PDF retrieval.

## Authentication

Every request requires a Bearer API key in the `Authorization` header and `application/json` in the `Accept` header.

```
Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>
Accept: application/json
```

## Pagination

List endpoints accept `page` and `per_page` query parameters and return Laravel-style paginated payloads (`data`, `links`, `meta`).
`per_page` is capped at 2000.

## Errors

The API uses standard HTTP status codes. Validation failures return `422` with a `message` and a `errors` object keyed by field. Authentication failures return `401`. Missing resources return `404`.

tags.name: Branches
tags.description: Manage company branches (the physical locations of the company).

tags.name: Hotel Tax
tags.description: Issue the special hotel residence tax document required by Greek hotels.

tags.name: Measurement Units
tags.description: Manage measurement units used on product line items.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Search by id. Accepts multiple ids separated by comma (,)

parameters.name: vat
parameters.description: Search by contact VAT

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Search by contact code. Accepts multiple contact codes separated by comma (,)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts (clients and/or suppliers) for the authenticated account. Supports filtering by `id`, `vat`, `code` and `email`. Soft-deleted contacts are excluded.

code.description: Contact code. If empty a random will be created

type.description: The type of the contact. 1 - Private, 2 - Company

is_client.description: If the contact is a client or not. true or 1 - is a client, false - it is not a client

is_supplier.description: If the contact is a supplier or not. true - is a supplier, false - it is not a supplier

name.description: Name of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

surname.description: Surname of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

company_name.description: The name of the contact. Required only if type is 2

profession.description: The profession of the contact. Required only if type is 2

vat_number.description: The VAT of the contact. If the contact is a non Greek company, the country's 2 letter code should be used as prefix. Required only if type is 2

tax_office.description: The tax officer of the contact. Required only if type is 2 and company is from Greece.

mobile.description: The mobile number of the contact

street.description: The street of the contact. Required only if type is 2

number.description: The number of the contact. Required only if type is 2 and street is present

city.description: The city of the contact. Required only if type is 2

zip_code.description: The zip code of the contact. Required only if type is 2

post.description: Creates a new contact. The `type` field controls which fields are required: private contacts (`type=1`) need `name` and `surname`, companies (`type=2`) need `company_name`, `profession`, `vat_number`, address, city and zip code. The `tax_office` is required for Greek companies. If `code` is omitted and account-level auto-numbering is enabled, the next available code is assigned automatically.

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: The ID of the contact to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single contact by its ID. Returns 404 if the contact does not exist or has been deleted.

put.summary: Update a contact. All values are needed.

code.description: Contact code. If empty a random will be created

type.description: The type of the contact. 1 - Private, 2 - Company

is_client.description: If the contact is a client or not. true or 1 - is a client, false - it is not a client

is_supplier.description: If the contact is a supplier or not. true - is a supplier, false - it is not a supplier

name.description: Name of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

surname.description: Surname of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

company_name.description: The name of the contact. Required only if type is 2

profession.description: The profession of the contact. Required only if type is 2

vat_number.description: The VAT of the contact. If the contact is a non Greek company, the country's 2 letter code should be used as prefix. Required only if type is 2

tax_office.description: The tax officer of the contact. Required only if type is 2 and company is from Greece.

mobile.description: The mobile number of the contact

street.description: The street of the contact. Required only if type is 2

number.description: The number of the contact. Required only if type is 2 and street is present

city.description: The city of the contact. Required only if type is 2

zip_code.description: The zip code of the contact. Required only if type is 2

put.description: Fully replaces a contact. **All** fields must be provided (omitted fields are reset). Use `PATCH /contacts/{contact_id}` to update only specific fields.

patch.description: Partial update — only the fields included in the request body are modified. Omitted fields keep their current value.

parameters.description: The ID of the contact to update.

is_client.description: If the contact is a client or not. true or 1 - is a client, false - it is not a client

parameters.name: date_from

parameters.description: Search to a specific date (including the date). Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Result per request. Max 2000.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number

get.description: Returns a paginated list of issued invoices. Supports filtering by `id`, `contact_id`, `contact_code`, `number`, `numbering_sequence`, and date range (`date_from`/`date_to`/`date`). Each item includes its MyData transmission status.

number.description: The number of the invoice. If it's empty then the next sequentional number will be used according to the invoices type and sequence.

numbering_sequence_id.description: The numbering sequence id of the invoice

issue_date.description: The issue date of the invoice

enum: p (Invoice for product sales and/or services)
rs (Receipt (issued to private customers) for services)
rp (Receipt (issued to private customers) for products and/or services)

mydata_document_type.description: The document type for MyData as seen at table 8.1 in AADE manual

payment_method_id.description: The id of the payment method to associate with the invoice

description.description: A description about the document. If left blank the description of the first item will be chosen.

contact_id.description: The id of the contact (client) that the invoice will be issued

logo_id.description: The id of the logo to be used. If it's empty the default logo will be used.

code.description: The id or code of the item

warehouse_id.description: The id of the warehouse the quantity will be removed. If skipped the default warehouse will be used.

description.description: The description of the item. Not required if valid product code is provided.

unit_net_value.description: The item unit price without VAT. Not required if valid product code is provided.

tax_id.description: The ID of the tax to be applied. Not required if valid product code is provided.

net_amount_pre_discount.description: The items' price before discount without VAT.

net_amount.description: The items' price without VAT. Not required if valid product code is provided.

vat_amount.description: The amount of the VAT. Not required if valid product code is provided.

mydata_classification_category.description: The mydata category from table 8.8 from AADE manual

mydata_classification_type.description: The mydata type from table 8.9 from AADE manual

is_paid.description: If it is set to true a receipt will be created and the invoice will be marked as paid. It does not work with Self Invoices (type self_inv)

comments.description: Comments to be printed on the invoice

infobox.description: Brief information to be printed on the invoice

post.description: Issues a new invoice. The `document_type` determines the invoice category (`s` services, `p` product sales, `rs`/`rp` retail receipts). The `mydata_document_type` follows AADE table 8.1. When `is_paid` is `true` a receipt is automatically created (does not apply to self-billed invoices). Items can reference an existing product via `code` (preferred) or be defined inline with `description`, `unit_net_value`, `tax_id` and net/VAT amounts.

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: The ID of the invoice to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single invoice by its ID. The response includes line items, payment status, MyData transmission state (MARK, UID, QR URL) and any credit notes issued against it.

get.summary: Retrieve the pdf of an invoice

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: The ID of the invoice to be retrieved

parameters.name: template
parameters.description: The template the PDF will be generated at

get.description: Returns the PDF representation of the invoice. The `template` query parameter selects the layout: `a4`, `a4_landscape` or `80mm` (thermal receipt). Defaults to the account-level template.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Search by id. Accepts multiple ids separated by comma (,)

parameters.name: contact_id

parameters.name: contact_code

parameters.description: Search from a specific date (including the date). Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Search exactly the specific date. Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of issued credit notes. Supports the same filters as `GET /invoices`.

number.description: The number of the invoice. If it's empty then the next sequential number will be used according to the invoices type and sequence.

correlated_invoice.description: The MARK of the correlated invoice. Required only if mydata_document_type is 5.1

numbering_sequence_id.description: The numbering sequence id of the credit note

issue_date.description: The issue date of the credit note

document_type.description: The type of the credit note.

language.description: The language of the credit note

mydata_document_type.description: The document type for MyData as seen at table 8.1 in AADE manual

payment_method_id.description: The id of the payment method to associate with the credit note

description.description: A description about the document. If left blank the description of the first item will be chosen.

contact_id.description: The id of the contact (client) that the credit note will be issued

unit_net_value.description: The item unit price without VAT

tax_id.description: The ID of the tax to be applied

mydata_classification_category.description: The mydata category from table 8.8 from AADE manual

mydata_classification_type.description: The mydata type from table 8.9 from AADE manual

comments.description: Comments to be printed on the credit note

infobox.description: Brief information to be printed on the credit note

post.description: Issues a new credit note. When `mydata_document_type` is `5.1` the `correlated_invoice` field (MARK of the original invoice) is required. The `document_type` selects between `pistotiko` (against an invoice) and `pistlianiki` (against a retail receipt).

parameters.name: credit_note_id
parameters.description: The ID of the credit note to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single credit note by its ID.

get.summary: Retrieve the pdf of an credit note

parameters.name: credit_note_id
parameters.description: The ID of the credit note to be retrieved

parameters.name: template
parameters.description: The template the PDF will be generated at

get.description: Returns the PDF representation of the credit note. The `template` query parameter selects the layout: `a4`, `a4_landscape` or `80mm`.
Returns the paginated list of delivery notes for the authenticated account.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Max 2000.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number.

post.description: Issues a new delivery note. Items can either reference an existing product via `code` (the line inherits the product's warehouse and measurement unit) or be defined inline. A `measurement_unit_id` must be available — either from the product or supplied explicitly per line. `shipping_details` is required and describes pickup, delivery and transfer information for AADE myDATA.

parameters.name: delivery_note_id
parameters.description: The ID of the delivery note to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieves a single delivery note by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Search by id. Accepts multiple ids separated by comma (,)

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Search by contact id

parameters.name: contact_code
parameters.description: Search by contact code

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Search from a specific date (including the date). Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Search to a specific date (including the date). Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Search exactly the specific date. Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Search by number. Accepts multiple invoice numbers separated by comma (,)

parameters.name: numbering_sequence
parameters.description: Search by numbering sequence. Accepts the numbering sequence id.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Result per request. Max 2000.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number

get.description: Returns a paginated list of issued notices (πρόσφορες — pre-invoice quotation documents).

number.description: The number of the notice. If it's empty then the next sequential number will be used.

numbering_sequence_id.description: The numbering sequence id of the notice.

issue_date.description: The issue date of the notice

expire_date.description: The expire date of the notice. Not required. If its empty it will be calculated 10 days after the issue date

description.description: A description about the document. If left blank the description of the first item will be chosen.

contact_id.description: The id of the contact (client) that the invoice will be issued

logo_id.description: The id of the logo to be used. If it's empty the default logo will be used.

unit_net_value.description: The item unit price without VAT

tax_id.description: The ID of the tax to be applied

mydata_classification_category.description: The mydata category from table 8.8 from AADE manual. Optional

mydata_classification_type.description: The mydata type from table 8.9 from AADE manual. Optional

post.description: Issues a new notice. If `expire_date` is omitted it defaults to 10 days after `issue_date`. A notice can later be turned into an invoice by passing its ID as `notice_id` when calling `POST /invoices`.

parameters.name: notice_id
parameters.description: The ID of the notice to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single notice by its ID.

get.summary: Retrieve the pdf of a notice

parameters.name: notice_id
parameters.description: The ID of the notice to be retrieved

parameters.name: template
parameters.description: The template the PDF will be generated at

get.description: Returns the PDF representation of the notice.

post.summary: Issue a hotel residence tax document
post.description: Issues the special hotel residence tax document (φόρος διαμονής) required by Greek hotels. Items must use a tax with MyData code `8` and a 0% VAT amount. The MyData document type is fixed to `8.2` and the document type to `fd`.

number.description: The number of the document. If empty the next sequential number will be used.

numbering_sequence_id.description: The numbering sequence ID. Must be a sequence of type `fd` (hotel tax).

issue_date.description: The issue date. Must be today or earlier.

payment_method_id.description: The ID of the payment method to associate.

correlated_mark.description: The MARK of the correlated invoice when the document refers to a previously issued invoice.

correlated_invoice.description: The ID of the correlated invoice when applicable.

contact_id.description: The ID of the contact (client) the document is issued to.

logo_id.description: The ID of the logo to be used. If empty the default logo is used.

is_paid.description: When `true` a receipt is created and the document is marked as paid. Defaults to `false`.

tax_category.description: Hotel tax category code. When provided it is applied to every line item that does not declare its own `tax_category`. Cannot be used together with item-level `tax_category`.

description.description: The description of the line item.

quantity.description: Quantity (positive integer, e.g. number of nights).

unit_net_value.description: Net unit value (must use a 0% VAT tax with MyData code 8).

tax_id.description: The ID of the tax to apply. Must be a 0% tax with MyData code 8.

net_amount.description: Total net amount of the line (`unit_net_value × quantity`).

tax_category.description: Hotel tax category code for this specific line. Required if `tax_category` is not provided at the document level.

mydata_classification_category.description: MyData category from table 8.8 of the AADE manual. Required unless category is `category1_95`.

mydata_classification_type.description: MyData type from table 8.9 of the AADE manual.

get.summary: Retrieve a specific hotel tax document

parameters.name: hotel_tax_id
parameters.description: The ID of the hotel tax document to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieves a previously issued hotel residence tax document by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Search by id. Accepts multiple ids separated by comma (,)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Search by name. The product will contain the search term

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Search by product code. Accepts multiple code seperated by comma (,).

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Search by category. Accepts the category id.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Result per request. Max 2000.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number

get.description: Returns a paginated list of products. Each product includes its warehouse breakdown, sale and purchase pricing, default discount, MyData income classifications, and any associated variations.

type.description: The type of the product. 1 - product, 2 - service, 3 - merchandise

category_id.description: The id of the category the product belongs to.

mpn_isbn.description: The MPN (or ISBN if its a book)

supplier_id.description: The id of the contact that supplies the product.

warehouses.description: Warehouse details the product belongs too.

position.description: The position of the product in the warehouse.

sale_net_amount.description: The sale net amount for the product

sale_tax_id.description: The id of the tax (vat) that should be applied at the sale price of product

purchase_net_amount.description: The purchase net amount for the product

purchase_tax_id.description: The id of the tax (vat) that should be applied at the purchase price of product

status.description: Status of the product, true is enable, false is disable

measurement_unit_id.description: The ID of the measurement unit (e.g. piece, kg, hour). Optional.

discount_type.description: The type of the default product discount.

discount_value.description: The default product discount value. Required when `discount_type` is set.

post.description: Creates a new product. `code` must be unique within the account. `type` selects the product kind (`1` product, `2` service, `3` merchandise). The `warehouses` array assigns starting quantities per warehouse and is required. Optional `discount_type` + `discount_value` define a default line-item discount when the product is added to a document.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: The ID of the product to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single product by its ID.

type.description: The type of the product. 1 - product, 2 - service, 3 - merchandise

category_id.description: The id of the category the product belongs to.

mpn_isbn.description: The MPN (or ISBN if its a book)

supplier_id.description: The id of the contact that supplies the product.

warehouses.description: Warehouse details the product belongs too.

position.description: The position of the product in the warehouse.

sale_net_amount.description: The sale net amount for the product

sale_tax_id.description: The id of the tax (vat) that should be applied at the sale price of product

purchase_net_amount.description: The purchase net amount for the product

purchase_tax_id.description: The id of the tax (vat) that should be applied at the purchase price of product

status.description: Status of the product, true is enable, false is disable

measurement_unit_id.description: The ID of the measurement unit (e.g. piece, kg, hour). Optional.

discount_type.description: The type of the default product discount.

discount_value.description: The default product discount value. Required when `discount_type` is set.

put.description: Partial update of a product. Only the fields included in the request body are modified. Omitted fields keep their current value.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: The ID of the product to be retrieved

get.description: Returns a paginated list of product categories. Inactive categories are excluded.

parameters.name: product_category_id
parameters.description: The ID of the product category to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single product category by its ID.
Returns a paginated list of variations (e.g. "Color", "Size") used to model product variants.

name.description: The name of the variation in Greek

name_en.description: The name of the variation in English

post.description: Creates a new variation. `name` is the Greek label and `name_en` is the English label.

get.description: Retrieves a single variation, including all its values.

parameters.name: variation_id
parameters.description: The ID of the variation.

get.summary: List of all the values for a variation
get.description: Returns the list of values defined for a variation (e.g. "Red", "Blue" for the "Color" variation).

post.summary: Create a new value for variation
post.description: Creates a new value for the variation.

parameters.name: variation_id
parameters.description: The ID of the variation.

get.summary: List a specific value of a variation
get.description: Retrieves a single variation value by its ID.

parameters.name: variation_id
parameters.description: The ID of the variation.

parameters.name: value_id
parameters.description: The ID of the value.

get.description: Returns the list of measurement units (e.g. piece, kg, hour) defined for the account. Each unit carries its MyData and Peppol B2G code.
Returns the list of warehouses defined for the account.
Returns every branch belonging to the authenticated account.

address_number.description: The street number of the branch.

postalcode.description: The postal code of the branch.

job_description.description: The professional description (activity) of the branch.

mydata_code.description: The MyData branch code (0-9999). `0` means main store.

post.description: Creates a new branch. `mydata_code` is the AADE branch code used when transmitting documents to MyData (`0` means the main store, otherwise the AADE-assigned branch number).

parameters.name: branch_id
parameters.description: The ID of the branch to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieves a single branch by its ID.

put.description: All fields must be provided. Use this to fully replace the branch attributes.

parameters.name: branch_id
parameters.description: The ID of the branch to update.

address_number.description: The street number of the branch.

postalcode.description: The postal code of the branch.

job_description.description: The professional description (activity) of the branch.

mydata_code.description: The MyData branch code (0-9999). `0` means main store.

get.description: Returns every business area defined for the authenticated account.

parameters.name: business_area_id
parameters.description: The ID of the business area to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieves a single business area by its ID.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number

get.description: Returns the list of taxes (VAT rates and other taxes) configured for the account.

title.description: A title for the tax. Required if mydata_vat_code is 999.

mydata_vat_code.description: The vat category as list at table 8.2 of AADE Manual. If the tax its not Greek then the mydata_vat_code should be 999.

mydata_vat_exemption_category.description: Required only if mydata_vat_code is 7. Values from table 8.3 of AADE manual

rate.description: The rate of the tax. Required if mydata_vat_code is 999 else not.

post.description: Creates a new tax. `mydata_vat_code` follows AADE table 8.2; when set to a code that is not a standard VAT rate, `mydata_vat_exemption_category` (AADE table 8.3) is required.

parameters.name: tax_id
parameters.description: The ID of the tax to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single tax by its ID.
Returns the list of numbering sequences. A numbering sequence determines the prefix and the next number for a document type (invoice, credit note, delivery note, ...).

document_type.description: The document type the numbering sequence associate's with.

title.description: This can be used to change the default title of some document types

is_draft.description: If the is_draft is set to true, then the invoice is considered draft and will not be send to MyData.

post.description: Creates a new numbering sequence. Set `is_draft` to `true` for sequences whose documents must NOT be transmitted to MyData (useful for internal drafts).

parameters.name: numbering_sequence_id
parameters.description: The ID of the numbering sequence to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single numbering sequence by its ID.
Returns the list of payment methods defined for the account, plus the system-wide defaults.

mydata_code.description: The mydata code as listed at table 8.12 at AADE Manual

status.description: If the numbering sequence is active or not

post.description: Creates a new payment method. `mydata_code` follows AADE table 8.12.

parameters.name: payment_method_id
parameters.description: The ID of the payment method to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single payment method by its ID.
Returns the list of logos / company headers used on issued documents.

parameters.name: logo_id
parameters.description: The ID of the contact to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single logo by its ID.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Result per request. Max 2000.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number

get.description: Returns a paginated list of Oxygen Payments (online payment links sent to customers). Requires the `oxygenpayments` add-on to be enabled on the account.

amount.description: The amount of the payment, 2 digit precision.

logo_id.description: The id of the logo to be used. If it's empty the default logo will be used.

language.description: The language of the oxygen payment.

post.description: Creates a new Oxygen Payment link. Requires the `oxygenpayments` add-on to be enabled.

parameters.name: oxygen_payment_id
parameters.description: The ID of the oxygen payment to be retrieved

get.description: Retrieves a single Oxygen Payment by its ID, including its current status, fees, and refund details.

get.summary: Retrieves details about about a Greek Business VAT.

parameters.name: vat
parameters.description: The Greek VAT number to look up via GSIS (without country prefix).

get.description: Looks up a Greek VAT number on the GSIS (Γενική Γραμματεία Πληροφοριακών Συστημάτων) registry. Returns business name, address, activity codes and validity flags.

get.summary: Retrieves details about about a EU Business VAT from VIES.

parameters.name: vat
parameters.description: The VAT number to look up via VIES (without country prefix).

parameters.name: country_code
parameters.description: The 2-letter country code (e.g. `DE`, `FR`).

get.description: Looks up an EU VAT number on the European Commission VIES service. Returns name and address where the responding member state provides them.

bearerAuth.description:
Every endpoint is protected with a bearer token.
During every request the token must be passed with the Authorization header and have the value  Bearer <token>.
In case of error the api returns 401 - Unauthorized.
Also, the "Accept" header should be passed with value "application/json".

code.description: Contact code. If empty a random will be created

type.description: The type of the contact. 1 - Private, 2 - Company

is_client.description: If the contact is a client or not. true or 1 - is a client, false - it is not a client

is_supplier.description: If the contact is a supplier or not. true - is a supplier, false - it is not a supplier

name.description: Name of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

surname.description: Surname of the contact. Required only if type is 1.

company_name.description: The name of the contact. Required only if type is 2

profession.description: The profession of the contact. Required only if type is 2

vat_number.description: The VAT of the contact. If the contact is a non Greek company, the country's 2 letter code should be used as prefix. Required only if type is 2

tax_office.description: The tax officer of the contact. Required only if type is 2 and company is from Greece.

zip_code.description: The zip code of the contact

is_active.description: Returns if the contact is active or not

tax_office_id.description: The numeric AADE tax office code that matches `tax_office`.

issue_date.description: The issue date of the invoice

enum: p (Invoice for product sales and/or services)
rs (Receipt (issued to private customers) for services)
rp (Receipt (issued to private customers) for products and/or services)

description.description: A small description of the document

contact_zip_code.description: The zip code of the contact (client)

vat_amount.description: The total VAT amount of the invoice

total_amount.description: The total amount of the invoice

unit_net_value.description: The item unit price without VAT

vat_exemption_category.description: If vat_category is 7 then the value is the from table 8.3 from AADE manual else its 0.

mydata_classification_type.description: The mydata type from table 8.9 from AADE manual

is_paid.description: Whether the invoice has been fully paid (`amount_pending` is `0`).

credit_note_ids.description: The IDs of any credit notes issued against this invoice.

mydata.description: Status of the invoice on the Greek tax authority (AADE) MyData platform.

status.description: Whether the invoice has been successfully transmitted to MyData.

mark.description: The MyData MARK identifier returned by AADE once the invoice is accepted.

uid.description: The MyData unique identifier (UID) returned by AADE.

authentication_code.description: Authentication code returned by AADE. Only present once issued.

errors.description: Returned only when the invoice was rejected by MyData (`status` is `false`).

status.description: The status of the invoice document.

comments.description: Free-form comments printed on the invoice.

infobox.description: Brief information printed on the invoice.

sale_total_amount.description: The total sale price (net + VAT) for the product.

name_en.description: The name of the variation in English
